about.subtitle: About Me
about.title: Crafting Digital Excellence
about.description: Passionate developer with a focus on creating impactful digital solutions
about.heading: Turning Ideas Into
about.bio1: I'm Umidjon Gafforov, a Full Stack & Mobile Developer based in Tashkent, Uzbekistan. With over 3+ years of experience, I specialize in building scalable web applications, mobile apps, and automation solutions.
about.bio2: My expertise spans across React, Next.js, Vue.js, Node.js, and React Native. I've helped businesses from startups to enterprises transform their digital presence and streamline their operations.
